Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPMSG1 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- Q ; EN(DVPRET,DOC) ; Get the DVP message and perform related operation D INIT^DVPLOG1 D:DEBUGMODE CREATE^DVPLOG1(DOC) N LINE,I,DVPARMS,CBK,DVPCNT,DVPLSTR,HDL,CHD,SIB,DVPSRC,DVPSML,ROUTINE,ENTRY,METHSIG,TARGET2,LOGINERR,OMODE,RETVAL S (DVPSML,DVPARMS,LOGINERR)=0,(ROUTINE,ENTRY,METHSIG,DVPLSTR)="",RETVAL=0,OMODE="JSON" ; Initialize the source and target global arrays S DVPSRC=$NA(^TMP("DVP_SOURCE",$J)) K @DVPSRC S DVPRET=$NA(^TMP("DVP_TARGET",$J)) K @DVPRET ; ; Parse incoming XML document S HDL=$$EN^MXMLDOM(DOC,"") D SET(.CBK) D EN^MXMLPRSE(DOC,.CBK,"") D PRSESSO ;Parse the CDATA section K ^TMP("MXMLDOM",$J) ; If SAML Assertion exists, log in user prior to making API call S TARGET2=$NA(^TMP("DVP_LOGIN_TARGET",$J)),RESULTS=TARGET2,TARGET=TARGET2 K @TARGET2 ;I '$D(@DVPSRC@("DVPESSO")) S LOGINERR=1 D BLDERROR^DVPUTL(400,"No CDATA section with SAML token found","EN^DVPMSG1") D SEND(.TARGET2) S LOGINERR=0 ;forced proceed without login needed I $D(@DVPSRC@("DVPESSO"))="1111" D I LOGINERR S RETVAL=0 G ENQ . ; Set up login . D LOGIN^DVPLOGIN(DVPSRC,.TARGET2) . I $D(@TARGET2@("error")) S LOGINERR=1 D . . D OOERR^DVPERR(.DVPRET,"fatal","unknown","MSG_AUTH_REQUIRED","Couldn't login using SAML authentication","EN^DVPMSG1") . . D SEND(.DVPRET) Q:LOGINERR 0 ; Get type of call (Specific API or RPC) ; Parse the PARAMS array and build params for method signature D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.DVPSRC,.PARAMS) ; ;no api element found I $G(@DVPSRC@("api"))="" D S RETVAL=0 G ENQ . D OOERR^DVPERR(.DVPRET,"fatal","missing-parameter","MSG_NO_MODULE","The <api /> element was not found","EN^DVPMSG1") . D SEND(.DVPRET) ; -- Identify Routine and Method from API N I,LINE F I=1:1 S LINE=$P($T(API+I^DVPEPTS),";;",2) Q:LINE["$$END$$" D . I $P(LINE,U)=$$LOW^XLFSTR($P(@DVPSRC@("api"),U)) D . . I $P(LINE,U,2)=$$LOW^XLFSTR($P(@DVPSRC@("api"),U,2)) S ENTRY=$P(LINE,U,3),ROUTINE=$P(LINE,U,4),OMODE=$P(LINE,U,5) ; -- If routine still undefined, throw OperationOutcome "Not Implemented" error I ROUTINE="" D S RETVAL=0 G ENQ . D OOERR^DVPERR(.DVPRET,"fatal","not-supported","MSG_NO_MODULE","The "_$P(@DVPSRC@("api"),U)_"^"_$P(@DVPSRC@("api"),U,2)_" API is not implemented","EN^DVPMSG1") . D SEND(.DVPRET) ; ; Verify that routine and entry point exist S MSIG=$$MTHDSIG^DVPUTL(ROUTINE,ENTRY) I MSIG="" D S RETVAL=0 G ENQ . D OOERR^DVPUTL(.DVPRET,"fatal","not-supported","MSG_NO_MODULE",_ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_" does not exist.","EN^DVPMSG1") . D SEND(.DVPRET) ; D:DEBUGMODE CATUP^DVPLOG1(ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE) S METHSIG=ENTRY_"^"_ROUTINE_"(.DVPSRC,.DVPRET)" ;execute the call N DVPERR,RESULTS,DVPSYM,DVPSYMGR,DVPSYMID D INIT^DVPUTL(.DVPSRC,.DVPRET) D @METHSIG ; S DVPPTYPE=4 ; -- send results D SEND(.DVPRET) S RETVAL=1 ; ENQ ; -- end message handler ; -- send eot and flush buffer D POST^DVPSKT K @DVPSRC,@DVPRET,^TMP("DVP_MSG",$J),^TMP("MXMLERR",$J),^TMP("VPR",$J),^TMP("XUDEVICE",$J) Q RETVAL ; SEND(DVPRET) ; -- stream data to client N DVPFMT,DVPFILL ; ; -- prepare socket for writing D PRE^DVPSKT ; -- Error occured. I $D(@DVPRET@("error")) S DVPRES=$NA(@DVPRET@("error")) G SEND2 S DVPRES=$NA(@DVPRET@("results")) ; SEND2 ; I OMODE="JSON" D Q . N JSON S JSON=$NA(^TMP("DVPJSON",$J)) . D ENCODE^VPRJSON(DVPRES,JSON) . D PRE^DVPSKT,OS^DVPSKT ;prepare the socket vars ($X and DVPOS) . I $D(^TMP("VPRJERR",$J)) D S RETVAL=0 G ENQ . . N STR S STR="{""OperationOutcome"": {""issue"": {""code"": ""exception"", ""details"": ""MSG_JSON_OBJECT"",""diagnostics"": ""Error occured while converting the response to json"",""location"": ""SEND2^DVPMSG1"",""severity"": ""fatal""}}}" . . D WRITE^DVPSKT(STR) . N IX S IX="" F S IX=$O(@JSON@(IX)) Q:IX="" D . . D WRITE^DVPSKT(@JSON@(IX)) . . D:DEBUGMODE RESPUP^DVPLOG1(@JSON@(IX)),GLBLUP^DVPLOG1(DVPRES) . D POST^DVPSKT K @JSON D PROCESS ; Q ; GETFMT() ; -- determine response format type I DVPPTYPE=1!(DVPPTYPE=5)!(DVPPTYPE=6) Q "string" I DVPPTYPE=2 Q "array" ; Q $S(DVPWRAP:"array",1:"string") ; PROCESS ; -- send the real results N I,T,D ; -- single value I DVPPTYPE=1 S DVPR=$G(DVPR) D WRITE^DVPSKT(DVPR) Q ; -- table delimited by CR+LF I DVPPTYPE=2 D Q . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" D WRITE^DVPSKT(DVPR(I)),WRITE^DVPSKT($C(10)) ; -- word processing I DVPPTYPE=3 D Q . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" D WRITE^DVPSKT(DVPR(I)) D:DVPWRAP WRITE^DVPSKT($C(10)) ; -- global array I DVPPTYPE=4 D Q . I $E($G(DVPRET))'="^" Q . S I=$G(DVPRET) Q:I="" S T=$E(I,1,$L(I)-1) . ;Only send root node if non-null. . I $D(@I)>10 S D=@I I $L(D) D WRITE^DVPSKT(D) . F S I=$Q(@I) Q:I=""!(I'[T) S D=@I D WRITE^DVPSKT(D) . I $D(@DVPRET) K @DVPRET ; -- global instance I DVPPTYPE=5 D Q . I $E($G(DVPR))'="^" Q . S DVPR=$G(@DVPR@("results")) D WRITE^DVPSKT(DVPR) ; -- variable length records only good up to 255 char) I DVPPTYPE=6 D . S I="" F S I=$O(DVPR(I)) Q:I="" D WRITE^DVPSKT($C($L(DVPR(I)))),WRITE^DVPSKT(DVPR(I)) Q ; SET(CBK) ;Set the event interface entry points K CBK S CBK("STARTELEMENT")="STELE^DVPMSG1" S CBK("ENDELEMENT")="ENELE^DVPMSG1" S CBK("CHARACTERS")="CHAR^DVPMSG1" Q ; STELE(ELE,ATR) ; -- element start event handler I ELE="remoteApplication" D . S @DVPSRC@("remoteApplication")=$G(ATR("authcode")) . Q I ELE="api" D . S @DVPSRC@("api")=$G(ATR("name"))_U_$G(ATR("resource")) . Q I ELE="method" D . S @DVPSRC@("method")=$G(ATR("name")) . Q I ELE="routine" D . S @DVPSRC@("routine")=$G(ATR("name")) . Q I ELE="methodSignature" D . S @DVPSRC@("methodSignature")=$G(ATR("name")) . Q I ELE="param" D . S DVPARMS=DVPARMS+1 . S @DVPSRC@("param",DVPARMS)=$G(ATR("name"))_U_$G(ATR("type"))_U_$G(ATR("value")) . Q I ELE="list" D . S @DVPSRC@("param",DVPARMS,$G(ATR("index")))=$G(ATR("value"))_U_$G(ATR("modifier"))_U_$G(ATR("prefix")) . Q I ELE="rpcName" D . S @DVPSRC@("rpcName")=$G(ATR("name")) . Q I ELE="user" D . S @DVPSRC@("DUZ")=$G(ATR("id")) . Q I ELE="output" D . S @DVPSRC@("output")=$G(ATR("type")) . Q Q ; ENELE(ELE) ; -- element end event handler K DVPCNT Q ; CHAR(TEXT) ; S TEXT=$$TRIM^XLFSTR(TEXT) I $E(TEXT,1)=$C(10),$L(TEXT)=1 Q S DVPLSTR=DVPLSTR_TEXT Q ; PRSESSO ; N IX,IY,OLDIX S (IX,IY)=0,OLDIX=1 F S IX=$F(DVPLSTR,$C(10),OLDIX) Q:IX=0 D . S DVPSML=DVPSML+1 . S @DVPSRC@("DVPESSO",DVPSML)=$E(DVPLSTR,OLDIX,IX-2) . S OLDIX=IX I IX'=$L(DVPLSTR) S DVPSML=DVPSML+1,@DVPSRC@("DVPESSO",DVPSML)=$E(DVPLSTR,OLDIX,$L(DVPLSTR)) Q
